subcodes.first_line: We have manifested unto every seeing one the Path of God and His Balance. To this beareth witness every fair-minded and insightful soul. Say: Fear ye God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اظهرنا لکل ذی بصر صراط الله و میزانه یشهد بذلک کل منصف خبیر قل اتقوا الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
